title: Hawksbill A4 White Card 160Gsm-50 Pack A4 White Cardstock for Printing Card
features: 160 GSM BRIDGES THE GAP BETWEEN PAPER & CARD: This bright white 50 pack of card from Hawksbill Paper is 160 grams per square metre (GSM) in weight and is thick and durable due to its strength as a thin card. Thanks to the smooth finish, this card enables easy gliding of ballpoint or ink pens onto the paper due to the lack of friction, making this product suitable for calligraphy projects while ensuring neat handwriting.

A4 PAPER FOR OFFICE & HOME PRINTING: 160 GSM is a high-quality thickness for card, ideal for printing brochures, flyers, leaflets, invitations or certificates. It is compatible with inkjet, laser and industrial printers. The paper is smooth – the ink will not be absorbed or bleed so text and images will come out crisp and clear, so you have perfect printouts every time, even when double-sided printing.

PREMIUM CREATIVE ACTIVITY CARD FOR KIDS: You might see a blank piece of card, but your child will see a sheet on which to be inventive. Low GSM card is super easy to cut out for kids while using safety scissors and is great for making cards for Easter, Christmas or birthdays together by sticking, drawing and painting. Make memories creating with your loved ones while they are young – show them how fun it is to craft on rainy days while off mobile phones!

GREAT FOR HOBBY ARTS & CRAFTING: 160 GSM A4 card is a versatile thickness and is considered a thin card. We would recommend this A4 craft paper for hands-on crafting such as making stationery and greeting cards or even for sketching with pencil, marker pens, acrylic, watercolours, gouache, charcoal, pastels, gel pens, fine liners or calligraphy inks. Hawksbill Paper has been long considered for art aficionados and craft lovers.

OVER 90 YEARS’ EXCELLENCE IN THE PAPER TRADE: Hawksbill Paper is an FSC-accredited family business which has been dealing in the UK paper trade for nearly a century. Our company is a mark of true quality paper; we travel worldwide to source the right paper for your home and office needs. We offer a range of A3 and A4 paper products available in many colours, sizes and pack quantities as well as our new poster paper and kraft wrapping paper.
